description: The `microsoft.dynamics365.finance.ledger` connector provides APIs for general ledger operations in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance. It covers journal headers and lines, main accounts, budget plans, fiscal calendars and periods, fund accounting, posting definitions, accrual schemes, and ledger allocation rules.
key-features: Create, read, update, and delete ledger journal headers and lines
Budget plans, budget cycles, and budget register entries
Fiscal calendars, fiscal years, and period allocation keys
